## Muskegon ISD Quarterly Check-in — Feb 2025

Attendees: Sarah Johnson (Muskegon ISD), David Kim (District Admin), Jamie Lee (IK12 CSM)

### Adoption Progress
District has seen strong uptake since the January training sessions. Office managers are reporting that the forms workflow has cut processing time by roughly 40%. Sarah mentioned that "the enrollment verification form alone has saved us hours each week."

### Pain Points
- Nelson Elementary and Lakeside Elementary still have low engagement; office managers there have not completed onboarding
- Some confusion around the sendback workflow — when a form is returned to a parent, staff aren't always sure how to track it
- Request for a bulk import feature for immunization records

### Wins
- Muskegon Heights Academy fully adopted within 3 weeks of launch
- Free/Reduced Lunch Application volume is up 15% month-over-month, indicating parent adoption
- District admin dashboard usage is daily

### Next Steps
- Schedule targeted training for Nelson and Lakeside office managers
- Create a quick-reference guide for the sendback process
- Explore bulk import capability for Q3 roadmap
